steps.title: Classify the relationship
steps.content: The first sentence says Haddad's painting inspired Rahman's exploration of temporality and identity. The next sentence adds another related point: the poem also reflects on poetry's relationship to other art forms.

steps.title: Signal an added claim
steps.content: A would restate the first idea, B would introduce an example, and D would mark a contrast. The needed transition adds a separate related claim rather than rephrasing, illustrating, or opposing the previous sentence. The answer is C.
